scripts.build: node scripts/clean.mjs && node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --project tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/build.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js deploy
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build && node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js deploy --dry-run
scripts.preview:cf: npm run build && node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js dev
